title: ursinia concolor
intro: Ursinia concolor, also known as the white daisy or white oxalis, is a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family Asteraceae. It is native to South Africa and is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ursinia concolor include treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as relieving digestive issues and reducing fever. Ursinia concolor can be prepared as an herbal tea or infused oil, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat a range of health issues.
